testpoints.name: reset_state_defaults
testpoints.description: After reset, all outputs should be at default zero values, stall=0, IDLE state

testpoints.name: lw_same_cycle_response
testpoints.description: Load word with memory accepting and responding in same cycle, writeback data returned

testpoints.name: sw_same_cycle_response
testpoints.description: Store word with memory accepting and responding in same cycle, memory write signals asserted

testpoints.name: lb_sign_extend
testpoints.description: Load byte with sign extension: data byte 0xFE sign-extended to 0xFFFFFFFE

testpoints.name: sb_byte_store
testpoints.description: Store byte replicates byte value across all byte lanes

testpoints.name: lh_halfword_load
testpoints.description: Load halfword with sign extension from memory

testpoints.name: lbu_unsigned_byte
testpoints.description: Load byte unsigned: byte value 0x80 returned as 0x00000080 (no sign extension)

testpoints.name: lhu_unsigned_halfword
testpoints.description: Load halfword unsigned: halfword value 0x8000 returned as 0x00008000

testpoints.name: lw_alignment_error
testpoints.description: Word load from misaligned address (addr=3) triggers alignment exception code 4

testpoints.name: sh_alignment_error
testpoints.description: Halfword store to unaligned address (addr=1) triggers alignment exception code 6

testpoints.name: load_page_fault
testpoints.description: Memory load fault signal asserted during load response causes page fault exception code 13

testpoints.name: store_page_fault
testpoints.description: Memory store fault signal asserted during store response causes page fault exception code 15

testpoints.name: memory_error_on_load
testpoints.description: Memory error signal during load response triggers access fault exception code 5

testpoints.name: illegal_instruction
testpoints.description: Opcode invalid signal asserted causes illegal instruction exception (code 2)

testpoints.name: lw_zero_data
testpoints.description: Load word returning zero data verifies writeback path with zero value

testpoints.name: lw_state_machine_accept_wait
testpoints.description: Load request without immediate accept: state transitions IDLE->ACCEPT->WAIT_RESP across cycles

testpoints.name: lw_state_machine_response
testpoints.description: After ACCEPT state, memory accept arrives and transitions to WAIT_RESP, then response completes

testpoints.name: fifo_multiple_requests
testpoints.description: Multiple requests queued while first request is in flight: FIFO stores them correctly

testpoints.name: tag_counter_increment
testpoints.description: Request tag counter increments with each issued request, tags are unique

testpoints.name: store_memory_error
testpoints.description: Memory error on store response triggers access fault (exception code 7)
